title: A sustainability page grounded in evidence, not unsupported claims.
intro: This page is structured for Hayked to publish verified sourcing, people, community and environmental practices as supporting documentation becomes available.

principles.title: Transparent sourcing
principles.text: Explain how suppliers, lots and source areas are identified and recorded.

principles.title: Responsible operations
principles.text: Document workplace, storage and processing practices using approved evidence.

principles.title: Long-term relationships
principles.text: Describe how Hayked builds dependable relationships with suppliers and international buyers.

principles.title: Verified reporting
principles.text: Publish certifications, measurements and impact statements only after they are confirmed.
